parent_dna.mission: Coordinate document work with traceable review and approval.
parent_dna.evolution_vector: Grow from simple review queues to governed document operations.

component_dna.mission: Own review queue state and reviewer assignment.
invariants: every queued item has a source evidence ref
success_criteria: review items move only through approved states
anti_patterns: component approves its own publication output

limitations: Synthetic alignment validates shape, not real product fitness.
